dialogues: Look at these two graphs. They show the SAME data.
Right. The information is the same. The format is different. Picture graphs use symbols. Bar graphs use bars. Both show the same data. You can read either one.
Graphs aren't just in math class. People use them everywhere. Look at these three scenarios. Which of these could use a bar graph to show the data? Select all that apply.
Exactly. All of them! Any time you're counting and comparing categories, a graph can help.
Graphs help people see patterns and make decisions. You'll see them in school, in stores, on the news, everywhere.
